subcodes.first_line: The Pen of the Most Merciful maketh mention of His friends and declareth: The Dayspring of Divine Books is manifest today, and He Who converseth [with God] hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم رحمن دوستان را ذکر مینماید و میفرماید مطلع کتب الهی الیوم ظاهر و مکلم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
